uplink.description: MOD 2 water-leak mode, leak detected (synthetic; bat 2.952 V)
uplink._note: byte0 0x4B = leak flag (0x40) | battery high bits; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: MOD 2 water-leak mode, no leak (synthetic; bat 3.0 V)
uplink._note: Leak bit clear; water.leak false covered here.

uplink.description: MOD 1 door mode, door closed, alarm set (synthetic; bat 2.952 V)
uplink._note: Door work mode still emits water.leak from the fixed status bit.

uplink.description: MOD 3 combined mode, door open and leak present (synthetic)
uplink._note: byte0 0xCB = door (0x80) | leak (0x40) | battery high bits; byte9 bit0 = alarm.

uplink.description: Unknown FPort returns an error (TTN example input)
Short payload on fPort 10 returns an error (TTN example bytes, 7 of 10)
uplink._note: Upstream TTN example input is only 7 bytes; a full status frame is 10.
